message:
ext(misc): implement bd-3gz3 generate_series, decimal arithmetic, and UUID

Add miscellaneous extensions (§14.7): generate_series virtual table with
positive/negative step and filter support, exact decimal arithmetic
(decimal/decimal_add/decimal_sub/decimal_mul/decimal_cmp) using string-
based computation to avoid floating-point loss, and UUID v4 generation
(uuid/uuid_str/uuid_blob) with blob roundtripping. 31 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
